name: Hub Cyber Security Ltd.
business: HUB Cyber Security Ltd. develops and markets quality management software tools and professional services, and also operates in the confidential computing and network security industry. The company serves organizations in security, electronics, aviation, telecommunications, banking, and other sectors globally.

exposures.sentence: Following the merger between the Company and HUB Cyber Security TLV Ltd, the Company also operates in the Confidential Computing and network security industry.
